notes: v1.14.77 - Master + scope-snapshot portability (roadmap P0): the parsed Master source-of-truth (phantom_master_v1) and the Master-derived scope snapshot (phantom_jobsnap_v1) now travel in the full-backup bundle as their raw LZString-compressed strings, and restore writes them back verbatim under the existing quota-rollback. Completes the portability story (with v1.14.74 quirks): handing off a backup now carries the reference layer, not just the deployments derived from it. No re-compression, no schema change.
